name: Donegal Oatmeal Cream
recipeInstructions:
"Pinhead" if you can get it. This is the cracked oat groat, not rolled.
Whipped.  Thin your favorite jam slightly with warm water. -- Soak the oatmeal in the milk for 30 minutes, then transfer to a pan and stir until it boils. Simmer for 3-4 minutes. Pour into a bowl and add the beaten egg, grated lemon rind, and sugar to taste. Dissolve gelatin in orange juice and water, then mix when cooled, fold in cream. Serve with 3-4 tablespoons of chosen fruit sauce on top.
